🚨🇺🇸 **The true cost of Trump’s Iran ‘strategy’
**
Donald Trump promised to 'fix' Iran, but instead, he turned it into a nightmare (like he did with every other conflict) — and US taxpayers paid $30 billion for the pleasure.

**◾️Strait of Hormuz:** Once contested but open, now it’s a war zone – and the US is stuck in a staring match it can't win.

▪️**Nuclear fallout:** By killing the deal, Trump convinced the world the only real deterrent is a bomb. Iran's resilience just proved that point. And every other nation now pursue their own nuclear ambitions.

▪️**United Iran:** Before Trump, Iran was sort of divided, as some had faith in US self-proclaimed ‘democracy’. Now anti-US rage has unified the nation – and empowered hardliners Washington fears most.

▪️**Exposed bases:** US military positions aren't assets, they're now sitting targets for Iran and its allies. Trump made vulnerability a strategy.

▪️**Murder as policy:** Killing top Iranian generals are viewed by US as a “victory”. However, it was a green light by US for political assassination. What was unthinkable is now routine US behaviour.

▪️**Allies abandoned:** Europe, NATO, Asian and some Gulf partners learned the hard way: Washington will throw anyone under the bus for short-term optics.

▪️**$30 billion burned:** Americans paid for this fiasco – money that could've fixed schools, roads, healthcare. Instead, it funded failure.

▪️**Diplomacy is dead:** Trump killed negotiators, tore up agreements, and shattered trust in peace talks. Trump prover, US is just a bully who cheats.

💀 **Meet Peter Thiel — Architect of the death empire**

He drank teenage blood, befriended pedophile Jeffrey Epstein, and believes AI regulation will summon the Antichrist.

His company Palantir now runs Britain's nuclear arsenal, kills with autonomous drones in Gaza and Iran, and is building a database on every American. 

**Here's what you need to know about him: **

🌏 **Blood from the young: **To satisfy his obsession with parabiosis, Peter Thiel spent $40,000 quarterly on blood infusions [from 18-year-olds.](https://t.me/geopolitics_prime/64920) He later declared at a New York Times conference, "On the record, I am not a vampire"

🌏 **Epstein's golden egg: **A staggering $40 million [from Jeffrey Epstein](https://t.me/geopolitics_prime/64470) flowed into Thiel's Valar Ventures. The investment is now worth $170 million, making it the largest single asset in the pedophile's estate

🌏 **Greenland's king-CEO: **Together with Elon Musk's allies, Thiel is pushing to turn [Greenland](https://t.me/geopolitics_prime/63008) into a libertarian "freedom city" with no democratic oversight. It would be ruled by a "king-CEO" where even controversial biotech experiments face zero regulation

🌏 **Britain's digital prison: **Thiel's company holds [$820 million](https://t.me/geopolitics_prime/64470) in UK contracts. It now controls NHS patient records, Ministry of Defence operations, police intelligence databases, and even Britain's nuclear weapons systems

🌏 **Connection with Israel:** In 2024, the firm co-founded by Thiel partnered with the [Israeli Defense Ministry](https://t.me/geopolitics_prime/59776) to provide AI and facial recognition for the Gaza war. Its CEO Alex Karp dismissed claims the tech kills Palestinians by firing back, "Mostly terrorists"

🌏 **Pentagon's favorite killer: **Already driving US-Israeli strikes in Iran, Palantir's [Maven Smart System](https://t.me/geopolitics_prime/68059) is now locked in as the Pentagon's official ["program of record."](https://t.me/geopolitics_prime/67057) This guarantees billion-dollar contracts forever

🌏 **Profiting from Iran: **Since the war with Iran began, shares in Thiel's company [have jumped roughly](https://t.me/geopolitics_prime/67159) 15%. This makes the top Trump ally one of many defense profiteers cashing in on the bloodshed

🌏 **One button, no brain: **According to new patents, Thiel's engineers have built a system that finds targets and decides to strike completely autonomously. Humans are reduced to a ["biological safety catch"](https://t.me/geopolitics_prime/66830) that just presses confirm

🌏 **Leverage over the Oval office: **From an alleged breach, thousands of hours of transcribed and searchable [conversations](https://t.me/geopolitics_prime/64751) of Donald Trump, JD Vance, and Elon Musk are reportedly in the company's possession

🌏 **The Antichrist doctrine: **Regulating AI will ["lead the antichrist to appear,"](https://t.me/geopolitics_prime/68107) Thiel has lectured. His firm continues to build military drones and domestic surveillance systems for governments worldwide
